traits.locale_text: [draft]Я же сказал не подходите! Стража, стража!

languages.text: "Приказ проигнорирован нарушителем. Взываю к протоколу аннигиляции!"
"Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"
languages.original_text: "Приказ проигнорирован нарушителем. Взываю к протоколу аннигиляции!"

traits.locale_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"
"Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"
"Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"

languages.text: «¡{mf|El intruso|La intrusa} ha ignorado la orden, invocando protocolo de aniquilación!».
languages.original_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"

traits.locale_text: «¡{mf|El intruso|La intrusa} ha ignorado la orden, invocando protocolo de aniquilación!».

languages.text: “入侵者无视命令。启动毁灭协议！”
languages.original_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"

traits.locale_text: “入侵者无视命令。启动毁灭协议！”

languages.text: « Ordre ignoré par l'{mf|intrus|intruse}. Invocation du protocole d'annihilation ! »
languages.original_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"

traits.locale_text: « Ordre ignoré par l'{mf|intrus|intruse}. Invocation du protocole d'annihilation ! »

languages.text: "Emir, davetsiz misafir tarafından görmezden gelindi. Yok etme protokolü başlatılıyor!"
languages.original_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"

traits.locale_text: "Emir, davetsiz misafir tarafından görmezden gelindi. Yok etme protokolü başlatılıyor!"

languages.text: 「侵入者による命令無視。殲滅手順起動！」
languages.original_text: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"
